mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, sort, leader, phone, email, status, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, sort = #{sort}, leader = #{leader}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, created_time ASC
SELECT FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort ASC, created_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
